description_long: A bald male security guard is dressed in a formal black suit with a white dress shirt and a black tie, exuding a professional and authoritative presence. His attire is well-fitted, with the jacket and pants matching in color and style, and black shoes completing the ensemble. The figure stands upright with arms extended horizontally, suggesting a neutral or T-pose stance. The face is clean-shaven, and no visible accessories such as hats, radios, or utility belts are present. The uniform is plain, lacking any visible insignia, badges, or patches that would typically denote rank or affiliation. The overall appearance is that of a standard, unadorned security guard suitable for upscale urban environments.
description: A bald male security guard in a formal black suit, white shirt, and black tie, standing upright with arms extended. The uniform is plain and professional, with no visible insignia or equipment.
description_view_0: Front view shows the security guard's face, black suit, white shirt, black tie, and both arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, the straight posture, and the extended left arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the bald head, the suit jacket, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the head, the straight posture, and the extended right arm.
attribute_uniform_type: The security guard wears a formal black suit consisting of a tailored jacket and matching pants, paired with a white dress shirt and a black tie. The shoes are black and appear to be standard dress shoes. The uniform is highly formal, with no visible variation or casual elements, and lacks any headgear or accessories. The overall appearance is standardized and professional, suitable for high-end or corporate urban settings.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with both arms extended horizontally in a T-pose, presenting a neutral and composed demeanor.
